user.title: Remote Containers
user.description: Configure SSH connection to the remote container host.

data_description.ssh_host: Hostname or IP address of the remote machine.
data_description.ssh_key_file: Path to SSH private key file (optional if using ssh-agent).
data_description.container_label: Only manage containers with this label (e.g., ha.remote.managed=true).

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the remote host. Check the hostname and port.
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Check the username and SSH key.
error.invalid_key_file: SSH key file not found or invalid.
